memoryArtifacts.description:
Gifford (Twyford, co. Bucks; Accott, co. Devon; Scotton, co. York; Battlebridge, co. Hunts; Stenes, co. Northampton; and Caswell Park, co. Oxford. Visit. Oxon, 1574). Arms same as Giffard, Earl of Buckingham [Gu. three lions pass. in pale ar.]. Crest -- An arm couped at the elbow vested or, charged with two bars wavy az. holding in the hand ppr. a buck's head cabosed gu.

Burke, Sir Bernard, _The General Armory of England, Scotland, Ireland, and Wales_, (London, 1884), p. 398

burialPlace.address: All Saints Parish Church, Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England.

sourceList.title: Listed as Roger Giffard, Esq. in Ancestral Roots of Certain American Colonists Who Came to America before 1700, Seventh Edition

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Gifford於1463年1月23日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾米德爾 可萊頓時，他的父親John Giffard Esq32歲，母親Agnes Winslow24歲。他於1490年與Mary Nanseglos在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年1月23日在英國巴金哈姆爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾米德爾 可萊頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Gifford于1463年1月23日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾米德爾 可萊頓时，他的父亲John Giffard Esq32岁，母亲Agnes Winslow24岁。他于1490年与Mary Nanseglos在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1543年1月23日在英国巴金哈姆爾享年80岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾米德爾 可萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Gifford was born on 23 January 1463, in Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, John Giffard Esq, was 32 and his mother, Agnes Winslow, was 24. He married Mary Nanseglos in 1490, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 23 January 1543, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Gifford est né le 23 janvier 1463, à Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Giffard Esq, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes Winslow, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mary Nanseglos en 1490, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 23 janvier 1543, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Gifford am 23. Januar 1463 in Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Giffard Esq 32 und seine Mutter Agnes Winslow 24. Er hat 1490 in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Mary Nanseglos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Januar 1543 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Gifford è nato il il 23 gennaio 1463 nel Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, John Giffard Esq, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Winslow, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mary Nanseglos nel 1490, nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 23 gennaio 1543, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Giffordが1463年1月23日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミッドル クレイドンで生まれた時，父John Giffard Esqは32歳，母Agnes Winslowは24歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーでMary Nanseglosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年1月23日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで80歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアミッドル クレイドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Gifford(이)가 1463년 1월 23일 영국 벅잉함실르 미들일 클레이던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Giffard Esq(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Winslow(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 Mary Nanseglos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 1월 23일 영국 벅잉함실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 미들일 클레이던에 묻혔다.

pt.23 January 1463–23 January 1543: 23 de janeiro de 1463–23 de janeiro de 1543
pt.Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England: Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Steeple Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Englan: Steeple Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Gifford nasceu em 23 de janeiro de 1463, em Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Giffard Esq, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Winslow, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Nanseglos em 1490, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1543, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Gifford родился 23 января 1463 г. в местности миддл клеидон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Giffard Esq было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Winslow, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Nanseglos в 1490 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 23 января 1543 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности миддл клеидон, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.23 January 1463–23 January 1543: 23 de enero de 1463–23 de enero de 1543
es.Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England: Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Steeple Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Englan: Steeple Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Gifford nació el 23 de enero de 1463, en Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Giffard Esq, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Agnes Winslow, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mary Nanseglos en 1490, en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1543, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
